# SR Natural Diamond

> Authentic natural diamond jewelry crafted for the modern Indian woman. Legacy meets Luxury.

## About

SR Natural Diamond is an Indian luxury jewelry brand specializing in authentic, IGI certified natural diamond jewelry. Founded by Mohit Chaplot and Leena Chaplot, the brand carries forward the legacy of the prestigious SR and Sons family. Based in Udaipur, Rajasthan with a branch office in Delhi.

## Products

### ENT Collection — Royal Heritage Bundle (₹85,000)
A curated 4-piece natural diamond jewelry bundle:
- **Heritage Nose Pin** — Delicate natural diamond nose pin in 18K gold
- **ENT Grace Earrings** — Matching pair of natural diamond earrings in 18K gold
- **Royal ENT Statement Pendant** — Stunning natural diamond pendant in 18K gold

**Specifications:**
- Material: 18K Gold with Natural Diamonds
- Diamond Clarity: VS1-VS2
- Diamond Color Grade: F-G
- Total Diamond Weight: 2.5 Carats
- Certification: IGI Certified & BIS Hallmarked
- Includes: Lifetime authenticity guarantee, complimentary jewelry box, free professional cleaning service

**Pricing:** ₹85,000 (23% below market rate due to direct sourcing and AI-optimized operations)
**Rating:** 4.9/5 from 156 reviews

## Brand Values
- 100% natural diamonds with IGI and BIS certification
- Direct sourcing for competitive pricing
- Traditional Indian craftsmanship meets modern design
- Lifetime authenticity guarantee
- AI-first shopping experience with personalized recommendations

## Diamond Quality
- Cut: Excellent cut grades for maximum brilliance and fire
- Clarity: VS1 to VS2 (very slight inclusions, invisible to naked eye)
- Color: F to G grade (appears colorless with exceptional brilliance)
- Carat: Ranging from 0.25 to 1.5 carats per stone, 2.5 carats total in the bundle
